parsed_review.summary: CP00-721 (RP23 External Integrations II finance-integrations P09 fixture/evidence/review/closeout, risk C, 84 units RP23.P09.M06.S09-RP23.P09.M10.S10) passes hardened read-only review with no findings. Independent static verification: (1) FINANCE_INTEGRATIONS_CP721_PACK_BINDING (registry.js:460) matches the baseline exactly — pack_id, unit_count 84, range, upstream CP00-720, next CP00-722/RP24.P00.M00.S01, H23/C23. (2) Hand-counted the 84 included units by deliverable: implementation 55, claude_review 12, security_audit 8, test 4, ui 4, hermes_evidence 1 — matches baseline and CP721_REQUIREMENTS (registry.js:3938); micro_title counts (12/22/20/20/10) also match. (3) No-write/no-real-data/runtime-closed boundaries are enforced by construction: validators.js validateDescriptor rejects non-descriptor-only rows, runtime execution, financial/credential payloads, bank/card/WEHAGO/Douzone/tax/DART runtime opening, permission-decision detail, audit bodies, and real financial data; service.js freezes every row with those flags false and attaches FINANCE_INTEGRATIONS_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION (all dispatch/persist/audit/hermes-runtime flags false). (4) Authority boundary correct: claude_is_final_approval=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust=false; claude_packet.read_only=true, allowed tools Read/Grep/Glob only. (5) Hermes used only for deterministic descriptor-only review packet/receipt (receipt_shape descriptor_only_finance_integrations_no_write, emits_runtime_receipt=false), not product runtime. (6) Tests (model.test.js:70-72) assert coverage errors empty, descriptor validity, runtime-closed packets, runtime_opening_pack_id CP00-722, and contract latest=CP00-721 with CP694-720 historical and validation.valid=true. (7) command-evidence.json shows all 10 required validation commands plus node --check/--test exit 0; readiness-report auth-preflight passed (exit 0, 1436-byte valid JSON stdout, no permission denials). (8) State is internally consistent and not over-claimed: manifest production_ready=false/runtime_ready=false, construction-inspection verdict PENDING/production_ready=false, adjudication pending — all reflecting that this very review was the only missing closeout input, not a defect; no production_ready:true/runtime_ready:true/enterprise-trust claims exist. Per instructions, the human/enterprise-trust final-approval boundary is outside this receipt and is not treated as blocking this CP closeout. The pack-level descriptor-verification production_ready claim is supported by implementation, tests, local validation evidence, adjudication, inspection, and the no-write/no-real-data boundaries.
